summary: Backend testing completed for Peer Practice feature enhancements. All 23 tests passed including new tests for subscription_plan field, max_sessions_per_day, blocked_dates, and Google Calendar integration endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: All new fields (subscription_plan, max_sessions_per_day, blocked_dates, google_calendar_connected) are correctly returned in API responses
GET /api/peers/list correctly returns subscription_plan for each peer
GET /api/peers/my-profile correctly returns all new fields
POST /api/peers/set-availability correctly accepts and stores max_sessions_per_day and blocked_dates
max_sessions_per_day correctly defaults to 3 when not provided
GET /api/peers/calendar/auth/start returns valid Google OAuth authorization_url
POST /api/peers/calendar/sync correctly fails with 400 when calendar not connected
seed_data_creation: Existing test profiles used. Availability updated with max_sessions_per_day=5 and blocked_dates=['2026-02-01', '2026-02-02']
context_for_next_testing_agent: Peer Practice feature enhancements fully tested. New fields verified: subscription_plan (returns 'Free Trial', 'Pro', 'Elite', or 'Subscribed'), max_sessions_per_day (defaults to 3), blocked_dates (list of YYYY-MM-DD strings), google_calendar_connected (boolean). Google Calendar OAuth endpoints working - auth/start returns valid authorization_url. Calendar sync requires actual Google credentials for full flow test.

endpoints: GET /api/peers/list - returns subscription_plan for each peer
subscription_plan_field.notes: subscription_plan correctly determined from user's plan field in users collection

blocked_dates.notes: Accepts list of YYYY-MM-DD date strings

google_calendar_integration.notes: OAuth flow requires actual Google credentials for full test. Auth/start correctly generates Google OAuth URL.

existing_features.notes: All existing peer practice features continue to work correctly

mocked_apis.note: Google Calendar OAuth requires actual Google credentials for full flow test, but auth/start endpoint correctly returns authorization_url
